Hotel Tariff Notes:
Compulsory Tourism Dirham to be paid by guest directly to the hotel per room per night valid from 31st March 2014 Onward.
No show and early departure will be subjected to 100% charge. No date, name and room change allowed. Bookings including children will be based on sharing parents bedding, no separate bed for children is provided unless otherwise stated.
Existing reservation cannot be cancelled and rebooked under lower promotion.

Extra person will be accommodated on sofa bed.

Note: The dress code for New Year&#039;s events is evening garments and tuxedos are mandatory.  Jeans and smart casual attire are strictly prohibited (especially during the Egypt Hall Party).
Please note guests are not allowed to cancel existing bookings and rebook. The hotel has the right to reject the booking.
The Tourism Dirham Fee charged per room per night is applicable when booking guest rooms &amp; suites and it will be collected directly at the property and is not reflected in the room rate.]]></tariffNotes>

<script type="text/javascript">
    function editField(contentView, contentInput) {
        let usertype = $('#getUser').val();
        if(usertype == 1) {
            let content = $('#' + contentView).text().trim();
            $('#' + contentInput).val(content).show().focus();
            $('#' + contentView).hide();
            $('#sendEmailButton').hide();
            $('#editEmailButton').show();
        }
    }
    function removeField(contentView,contentInput) {
        let usertype = $('#getUser').val();
        if(usertype == 1) {
            let content = $('#' + contentInput).val().trim();

            if(content.length > 0) {
                if(contentView == 'specialCode') {

                    $('#' + contentView).html('<div style="color: #5CB85C; font-weight: bold;">'+content+'</div>').show();
                    $('.dailyRatesInput').html(content).show();
                } else {
                    $('#' + contentView).text(content).show();
                }
            } else {
                $('#' + contentView).text('none').show();
                $('.dailyRatesInput').hide();
            }

	        $('#' + contentInput).hide();
        }
    }
</script>

<script type="text/javascript">
    function editField(contentView, contentInput) {
        let usertype = $('#getUser').val();
        if(usertype == 1) {
            let content = $('#' + contentView).text().trim();
            $('#' + contentInput).val(content).show().focus();
            $('#' + contentView).hide();
            $('#sendEmailButton').hide();
            $('#editEmailButton').show();
        }
    }
    function removeField(contentView,contentInput) {
        let usertype = $('#getUser').val();
        if(usertype == 1) {
            let content = $('#' + contentInput).val().trim();

            if(content.length > 0) {
                if(contentView == 'specialCode') {

                    $('#' + contentView).html('<div style="color: #5CB85C; font-weight: bold;">'+content+'</div>').show();
                    $('.dailyRatesInput').html(content).show();
                } else {
                    $('#' + contentView).text(content).show();
                }
            } else {
                $('#' + contentView).text('none').show();
                $('.dailyRatesInput').hide();
            }

	        $('#' + contentInput).hide();
        }
    }
</script>

<script type="text/javascript">
    function editField(contentView, contentInput) {
        let usertype = $('#getUser').val();
        if(usertype == 1) {
            let content = $('#' + contentView).text().trim();
            $('#' + contentInput).val(content).show().focus();
            $('#' + contentView).hide();
            $('#sendEmailButton').hide();
            $('#editEmailButton').show();
        }
    }
    function removeField(contentView,contentInput) {
        let usertype = $('#getUser').val();
        if(usertype == 1) {
            let content = $('#' + contentInput).val().trim();

            if(content.length > 0) {
                if(contentView == 'specialCode') {

                    $('#' + contentView).html('<div style="color: #5CB85C; font-weight: bold;">'+content+'</div>').show();
                    $('.dailyRatesInput').html(content).show();
                } else {
                    $('#' + contentView).text(content).show();
                }
            } else {
                $('#' + contentView).text('none').show();
                $('.dailyRatesInput').hide();
            }

	        $('#' + contentInput).hide();
        }
    }
</script>

<script type="text/javascript">
    function editField(contentView, contentInput) {
        let usertype = $('#getUser').val();
        if(usertype == 1) {
            let content = $('#' + contentView).text().trim();
            $('#' + contentInput).val(content).show().focus();
            $('#' + contentView).hide();
            $('#sendEmailButton').hide();
            $('#editEmailButton').show();
        }
    }
    function removeField(contentView,contentInput) {
        let usertype = $('#getUser').val();
        if(usertype == 1) {
            let content = $('#' + contentInput).val().trim();

            if(content.length > 0) {
                if(contentView == 'specialCode') {

                    $('#' + contentView).html('<div style="color: #5CB85C; font-weight: bold;">'+content+'</div>').show();
                    $('.dailyRatesInput').html(content).show();
                } else {
                    $('#' + contentView).text(content).show();
                }
            } else {
                $('#' + contentView).text('none').show();
                $('.dailyRatesInput').hide();
            }

	        $('#' + contentInput).hide();
        }
    }
</script>
            </td>
        </tr>

<script type="text/javascript">
    function editField(contentView, contentInput) {
        let usertype = $('#getUser').val();
        if(usertype == 1) {
            let content = $('#' + contentView).text().trim();
            $('#' + contentInput).val(content).show().focus();
            $('#' + contentView).hide();
            $('#sendEmailButton').hide();
            $('#editEmailButton').show();
        }
    }
    function removeField(contentView,contentInput) {
        let usertype = $('#getUser').val();
        if(usertype == 1) {
            let content = $('#' + contentInput).val().trim();

            if(content.length > 0) {
                if(contentView == 'specialCode') {

                    $('#' + contentView).html('<div style="color: #5CB85C; font-weight: bold;">'+content+'</div>').show();
                    $('.dailyRatesInput').html(content).show();
                } else {
                    $('#' + contentView).text(content).show();
                }
            } else {
                $('#' + contentView).text('none').show();
                $('.dailyRatesInput').hide();
            }

	        $('#' + contentInput).hide();
        }
    }
</script>

<script type="text/javascript">
    function editField(contentView, contentInput) {
        let usertype = $('#getUser').val();
        if(usertype == 1) {
            let content = $('#' + contentView).text().trim();
            $('#' + contentInput).val(content).show().focus();
            $('#' + contentView).hide();
            $('#sendEmailButton').hide();
            $('#editEmailButton').show();
        }
    }
    function removeField(contentView,contentInput) {
        let usertype = $('#getUser').val();
        if(usertype == 1) {
            let content = $('#' + contentInput).val().trim();

            if(content.length > 0) {
                if(contentView == 'specialCode') {

                    $('#' + contentView).html('<div style="color: #5CB85C; font-weight: bold;">'+content+'</div>').show();
                    $('.dailyRatesInput').html(content).show();
                } else {
                    $('#' + contentView).text(content).show();
                }
            } else {
                $('#' + contentView).text('none').show();
                $('.dailyRatesInput').hide();
            }

	        $('#' + contentInput).hide();
        }
    }
</script>

A damage deposit is required on arrival. This will be collected as a cash payment. Guests should be reimbursed on check-out. The deposit will be refunded in full, in cash, subject to an inspection of the property.<br />
<br />
The Tourism Dirham Fee charged per room per night is applicable when booking guest rooms & suites and it will be collected directly at the property and is not reflected in the room rate.<br />
<br />
Extra bed for children (additional charge)<br />
<br />
Check-in: 15:00 / Check-out: 12:00<br />
<br />
Early check-in and Late check-out are subject to availability and can only be confirmed on the day of arrival / departure. <br />
<br />
Early check-in and Late check-out are not allowed from 29th December 2025 to 1st January 2026.<br />
This hotel charges according to residency; therefore, if you hold residency in the hotels country of destination, please enter your country of residency as your nationality</p>

<br />

<p><strong>Bookings including children will be based on sharing parents bedding and no separate bed for children is provided unless otherwise stated.</strong></p>

<script type="text/javascript">
    function editField(contentView, contentInput) {
        let usertype = $('#getUser').val();
        if(usertype == 1) {
            let content = $('#' + contentView).text().trim();
            $('#' + contentInput).val(content).show().focus();
            $('#' + contentView).hide();
            $('#sendEmailButton').hide();
            $('#editEmailButton').show();
        }
    }
    function removeField(contentView,contentInput) {
        let usertype = $('#getUser').val();
        if(usertype == 1) {
            let content = $('#' + contentInput).val().trim();

            if(content.length > 0) {
                if(contentView == 'specialCode') {

                    $('#' + contentView).html('<div style="color: #5CB85C; font-weight: bold;">'+content+'</div>').show();
                    $('.dailyRatesInput').html(content).show();
                } else {
                    $('#' + contentView).text(content).show();
                }
            } else {
                $('#' + contentView).text('none').show();
                $('.dailyRatesInput').hide();
            }

	        $('#' + contentInput).hide();
        }
    }
</script>

- Certain services are non amendable and should be rebooked as per new dates before the cancellation deadline.<br />
- No Passenger Name change allowed</p>

<script type="text/javascript">
    function editField(contentView, contentInput) {
        let usertype = $('#getUser').val();
        if(usertype == 1) {
            let content = $('#' + contentView).text().trim();
            $('#' + contentInput).val(content).show().focus();
            $('#' + contentView).hide();
            $('#sendEmailButton').hide();
            $('#editEmailButton').show();
        }
    }
    function removeField(contentView,contentInput) {
        let usertype = $('#getUser').val();
        if(usertype == 1) {
            let content = $('#' + contentInput).val().trim();

            if(content.length > 0) {
                if(contentView == 'specialCode') {

                    $('#' + contentView).html('<div style="color: #5CB85C; font-weight: bold;">'+content+'</div>').show();
                    $('.dailyRatesInput').html(content).show();
                } else {
                    $('#' + contentView).text(content).show();
                }
            } else {
                $('#' + contentView).text('none').show();
                $('.dailyRatesInput').hide();
            }

	        $('#' + contentInput).hide();
        }
    }
</script>

<script type="text/javascript">
    function editField(contentView, contentInput) {
        let usertype = $('#getUser').val();
        if(usertype == 1) {
            let content = $('#' + contentView).text().trim();
            $('#' + contentInput).val(content).show().focus();
            $('#' + contentView).hide();
            $('#sendEmailButton').hide();
            $('#editEmailButton').show();
        }
    }
    function removeField(contentView,contentInput) {
        let usertype = $('#getUser').val();
        if(usertype == 1) {
            let content = $('#' + contentInput).val().trim();

            if(content.length > 0) {
                if(contentView == 'specialCode') {

                    $('#' + contentView).html('<div style="color: #5CB85C; font-weight: bold;">'+content+'</div>').show();
                    $('.dailyRatesInput').html(content).show();
                } else {
                    $('#' + contentView).text(content).show();
                }
            } else {
                $('#' + contentView).text('none').show();
                $('.dailyRatesInput').hide();
            }

	        $('#' + contentInput).hide();
        }
    }
</script>

- No Passenger Name change allowed</p>

The Tourism Dirham Fee charged per room per night is applicable when booking guest rooms & suites and it will be collected directly at the property and is not reflected in the room rate.</p>

───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  TEST 10: Passenger Name Restrictions — sanitization + min 2 / max 25 chars, no dupes
───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  Passenger name sanitization pipeline (COMPLY-01):
  1. Strip all whitespace (space, tab, etc.) — merges multi-word names
  2. Remove all non-alphabetic characters (digits, specials, apostrophes)
  3. Enforce min 2 chars (throw InvalidArgumentException if below)
  4. Enforce max 25 chars (truncate — not throw)

  Other rules:
  - No duplicate names across passengers in same booking
  - All passengers (including children) must be listed in confirmbooking

  Sanitization demonstrations:
  ✔  'John' → 'John' (4 chars) — VALID — Standard name — no change
  ✔  'J' → 'J' (1 chars) — INVALID — Too short (1 char) — INVALID
  ✔  'JohnAlexanderMaximilian123' → 'JohnAlexanderMaximilian' (23 chars) — VALID — Digits stripped; 23 chars → VALID (≤25)
  ✔  'James Lee' → 'JamesLee' (8 chars) — VALID — Space stripped → "JamesLee" (8 chars) — VALID
  ✔  'O'Brien' → 'OBrien' (6 chars) — VALID — Apostrophe stripped → "OBrien" (6 chars) — VALID
  ✔  '123' → '' (0 chars) — INVALID — All digits → empty after sanitize — INVALID
  ✔  All sanitization cases match expected output
  RESULT: ✔ PASS

<script type="text/javascript">
    function editField(contentView, contentInput) {
        let usertype = $('#getUser').val();
        if(usertype == 1) {
            let content = $('#' + contentView).text().trim();
            $('#' + contentInput).val(content).show().focus();
            $('#' + contentView).hide();
            $('#sendEmailButton').hide();
            $('#editEmailButton').show();
        }
    }
    function removeField(contentView,contentInput) {
        let usertype = $('#getUser').val();
        if(usertype == 1) {
            let content = $('#' + contentInput).val().trim();

            if(content.length > 0) {
                if(contentView == 'specialCode') {

                    $('#' + contentView).html('<div style="color: #5CB85C; font-weight: bold;">'+content+'</div>').show();
                    $('.dailyRatesInput').html(content).show();
                } else {
                    $('#' + contentView).text(content).show();
                }
            } else {
                $('#' + contentView).text('none').show();
                $('.dailyRatesInput').hide();
            }

	        $('#' + contentInput).hide();
        }
    }
</script>
            </td>
        </tr>

<script type="text/javascript">
    function editField(contentView, contentInput) {
        let usertype = $('#getUser').val();
        if(usertype == 1) {
            let content = $('#' + contentView).text().trim();
            $('#' + contentInput).val(content).show().focus();
            $('#' + contentView).hide();
            $('#sendEmailButton').hide();
            $('#editEmailButton').show();
        }
    }
    function removeField(contentView,contentInput) {
        let usertype = $('#getUser').val();
        if(usertype == 1) {
            let content = $('#' + contentInput).val().trim();

            if(content.length > 0) {
                if(contentView == 'specialCode') {

                    $('#' + contentView).html('<div style="color: #5CB85C; font-weight: bold;">'+content+'</div>').show();
                    $('.dailyRatesInput').html(content).show();
                } else {
                    $('#' + contentView).text(content).show();
                }
            } else {
                $('#' + contentView).text('none').show();
                $('.dailyRatesInput').hide();
            }

	        $('#' + contentInput).hide();
        }
    }
</script>
